ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source where the indicator is obtained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the indicator */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the market indicator on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the data point */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of the trend */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used to identify the trend */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to identify the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, trend) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training session */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the model after training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value of the market indicator */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert if the prediction triggers an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration project */,
  "members" TEXT /* List of user IDs participating in the collaboration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data ID if applicable */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard ID if applicable */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert ID if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
